name: watchdeck
description: Resume YouTube videos right where you left off. Progress stays on your device. No sync. No accounts.
author: Utpal Sen <contactutpalsen@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsup --entry.content src/entrypoints/content.ts --entry.background src/entrypoints/background.ts --entry.popup src/entrypoints/popup.ts --format iife --target es2020 --out-dir dist --clean=false && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run smoke && vitest --run && npm run package
